/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/VulkanTest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/VulkanTest.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanTest.dir/vt_app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanTest.dir/vte_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanTest.dir/vte_device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanTest.dir/vte_graphicspp.cpp.o -o VulkanTest  /usr/lib/libvulkan.so /usr/lib/libglfw.so.3.4
